ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's physical address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product's category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed product description */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Product brand name */,
  "model" TEXT /* Product model number */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer making the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product being purchased */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating given by the customer */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if any discount was applied during the transaction */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total transaction cost after applying any discounts */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who rated the product */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Quality rating value given by the customer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review in addition to the rating */,
  "rated_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* For hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the related transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping cart entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer owning the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was added to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_histories" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who placed the order */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the transaction linked to the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_histories_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_histories_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_histories ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order linked to the shipping address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_histories ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
